rationale: Enterprise tax and finance tools require maximum clarity, authority, and objective data presentation. A light theme with high contrast ensures readability for dense data tables and complex forms.

typography.guidelines: Use tight letter spacing (tracking-tight) for headings above 24px. Do NOT use Inter or Roboto for headings. Keep hierarchy strict.

layout_strategy.spacing: Dense 'Control Room' grid layout for the dashboard. Use p-4 to p-6 for widget cards. Maintain tight gap (gap-4 or gap-6) to keep data correlated.
layout_strategy.alignment: Left-align forms, lists, and tabular data. Optical alignment over strict geometric alignment for icons.
layout_strategy.surfaces: Use 'Grid Borders' or flat surfaces. Avoid heavy soft shadows. Use 1px subtle borders (border-slate-200) to define containers.

components.navigation: Top Header or left Sidebar. Must include a clear Environment Selector (Pre-Producción vs Producción) and the application logo.
components.cards: Flat, cardless feel or strict rectangular boxes with 1px border. No rounding greater than 8px (rounded-md).
components.tables: Shadcn UI Table. Essential for 'Histórico de consultas'. Needs to handle dense data, pagination, and sticky headers.
components.forms: Shadcn UI Form, Input, Select. For 'Consulta Unitaria', use a 2-column CSS grid on desktop to save vertical space. Left-aligned labels.
components.modals: Shadcn UI Dialog or Sheet for viewing 'Detalle de respuesta' (raw XML/JSON data).

image_urls.description: Minimal abstract square logo for the application branding
Abstract blue geometric data wave, suitable for a login screen or a subtle header texture

accessibility_and_testing.data_testid_convention: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid. Format: kebab-case, role-based (e.g., unit-query-submit-button, env-selector-dropdown).
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure minimum 4.5:1 ratio for normal text. Use APCA guidelines.

instructions_to_main_agent: Language: Implement all UI text in Spanish.
Mocking: Implement a mocked service for the SOAP SII API, generating random accepted/rejected/error responses.
Dashboard: Build a summary view with key stats (total, accepted, rejected ratios) using Shadcn Charts or Recharts.
Consulta Unitaria: Build a comprehensive form (NIF titular, ejercicio, periodo, NIF emisor, num factura, fecha).
Consulta Batch: Implement a CSV file upload interface.
Histórico: Implement a paginated list/table of past queries with a 'View Details' action.
Detalle: Show the simulated parsed SOAP response and raw XML in a structured format.
Do NOT use generic Inter for headings. Setup 'Satoshi' via Google Fonts or Fontshare, and 'IBM Plex Sans' for body text.
